text:
DUAL_ELGBL_MONS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12 

COMMENT: CCW derived this variable by counting the number of months where the beneficiary had dual eligibility 
(i.e., months where DUAL_STUS_CD_XX equal to '01', '02', '03', '04', '05', '06', '08', '09', or '99'). 

There are different ways to classify dually eligible beneficiaries — in terms of whether he/she is 
enrolled in full or partial benefits. Additional information
